steps.title: Match the ordered list
steps.content: The passage introduces three research questions and then labels the second and final questions with "Second" and "Finally." The first question needs the matching ordinal marker that begins the sequence.

steps.title: Reject nonordinal transitions
steps.content: A signals a result, C adds another point without marking sequence position, and D signals contrast. The sentence needs the first item in an ordered list of questions. The answer is B.
